import React from "react"; import "../styles/About.css"; // Import the CSS file const teamMembers = [ { name: "Vedant", image: "/images/manicon.png", description: "I am the student of Lncte. Currently pursuing B.Tech from CSE-DS.", }, { name: "Ayaansh Rajotia", image: "/images/manicon.png", description: "I am the student of Lncte. Currently pursuing B.Tech from CSE-DS.", }, { name: "Tanisha Jain", image: "/images/images.png", description: "I am the student of Lncte. Currently pursuing B.Tech from CSE-DS.", }, { name: "Aditya Mishra", image: "/images/manicon.png", description: "I am the student of Lncte. Currently pursuing B.Tech from CSE-DS.", }, { name: "Mayank Soni", image: "/images/manicon.png", description: "I am the student of Lncte. Currently pursuing B.Tech from CSE-DS.", }, { name: "Anshuman Tripathi", image: "/images/manicon.png", description: "I am the student of Lncte. Currently pursuing B.Tech from CSE-DS.", }, ]; const About = () => { return (

About Us

Welcome to Agriconnect, your digital hub for all things agriculture.

Our Mission

At Agriconnect, we are on a mission to revolutionize the way farmers and agricultural enthusiasts connect, collaborate, and cultivate success. We believe that agriculture is the backbone of our world, and we are committed to empowering those who work the land by providing them with the tools and resources they need to thrive.

Our Vision

We envision a world where agriculture is sustainable, profitable, and accessible to all. Agriconnect is our contribution to this vision, and we invite you to be a part of this exciting journey.

Join Us on Our Journey

We invite you to be a part of the Agriconnect community. Together, we can shape the future of agriculture and create a more sustainable and prosperous world for all.

Our Team

{teamMembers.map((member, index) => (

{member.name}

{member.description}

))}
); }; export default About;
